projectDescription: A WhatsApp chatbot that acts as a university assistant, combining fuzzy FAQ matching with Groq-powered LLM responses via a Flask webhook.
keyFeatures: WhatsApp webhook integration via Meta Cloud API
Fuzzy matching against a JSON knowledge base for fast FAQ retrieval
Groq LLaMA3 LLM for context-aware university assistant responses
Flask-based HTTP server with GET verification and POST message handling
Simple data.json knowledge base — no database required
publicApiSurface: POST /webhook — Receive and process incoming WhatsApp messages
manejar_query(mensaje_usuario) — Orchestrates context lookup and LLM response
buscar_contexto(pregunta_usuario) — Fuzzy-matches user question against knowledge base
consultar_llm(contexto, pregunta) — Sends context + question to Groq API and returns answer
enviar_mensaje(numero, texto) — Sends a WhatsApp text message via Meta Cloud API
